LC8S-7G2: Born in Antwerp in 1590, Ludowick Rowzee earned his Doctor of Medicine degree from Leiden University in 1616. He later crossed to England, where he was licensed at Canterbury, Kent, in 1618 for teaching and medical practice. He spent the rest of his life as a medical doctor, dying at Ashford, Kent, in 1639.
G7X3-HG2: William Perry was born in 1667 at Claverley, Shropshire, England. He died in 1726 at Bilston, Staffordshire, England.
LZP7-HM9: John Costen lived his entire life in Godalming, Surrey, England, where he was born in 1597 and died in 1652.
LVG3-NF7: Henry Travers was born in London, England, in 1610. In 1634 he crossed the Atlantic aboard the Mary & John, arriving at Newbury in the Massachusetts Bay Colony. He died in 1659, back in England.
KHJ4-NG3: Alice Susanna Backfisch was born in 1655 in Oberdielbach, in the Baden region, and was baptized that January at Strümpfelbrunn. She lived out her long life in the Eberbach area of Baden, where she died in 1741.
GD6Y-CYQ: Gabriel Gustave de Crocketagne was born in 1622 in the Tarn-et-Garonne region of France. He died in 1672 at Montauban-de-Bretagne in Brittany.
